# Notepad Online

> Free online notepad with instant sharing. Write, edit, format, and share notes in your browser. No signup required.

## About

Notepad Online (notepadonline.app) is a free, browser-based text editor that lets anyone write, format, and share notes instantly. No account or signup is needed. Notes auto-save in your browser and can be shared with a unique link.

## Features

- Rich text editing (bold, italic, headings, lists, quotes, code blocks)
- Instant sharing via unique link
- Auto-save in browser
- Live word, character, and line count
- Dark and light mode
- Download notes as .txt files
- Print notes
- Fully responsive on all devices
- No signup, no ads, no tracking

## How Sharing Works

Click the Share button to save your note and generate a unique link. Anyone with the link can view the note instantly without signing up. Shared notes are stored on our server. Local notes stay in your browser only.

## Privacy

- No personal data collected
- No cookies or tracking
- No user accounts
- Local notes never leave your browser
- Shared notes are public via their unique link
- Vercel Web Analytics (anonymous, no cookies)

## URL

https://notepadonline.app/
